name: nacl
description: NaCl framework: BA/SA/TL spec-graph methodology skills, backed by a Neo4j project graph.

plugins.name: nacl
plugins.description: 53 skills for the NaCl methodology: business analysis (ba-*), solution architecture (sa-*), and team-lead delivery (tl-*) phases, all writing to a per-project Neo4j spec graph. Ships 7 role agents, a graph liveness SessionStart hook, and deterministic graph tooling. Requires Docker Desktop (local graph) or a remote NaCl graph; run /nacl:init in a project to set up.
